caption: A man with a tall, textured grey wig and glasses sits in a recording studio, wearing a white dress shirt, yellow suspenders, and a bow tie. He wears black headphones and speaks into a professional black microphone positioned in front of him. In the background, a woman with pink hair wearing a green dress stands near a wall featuring a sign that reads "UNIQUE FASHIONS". A logo depicting a gold shield is visible on the wall behind her. Across the bottom of the scene, on-screen text reads "#STALK PODCAST" on the left and "SS TALK 101" on the right. Throughout the sequence, the man remains seated and continues speaking, while the woman in the background shifts her position slightly. The lighting is bright and consistent, and the camera angle remains stationary, capturing the man from the waist up.
